title: Nether Coords
description: Simple mod for easier nether portal linking
body:
Nether Coords is a Fabric client side mod that provides players with easier ways of determining relative coordinates in game. Because Nether Coords is a client-side mod it works in both Singleplayer and Multiplayer and does not need to be installed on the server, just on the client.

Commands:

  • /portal - Get coords for a portal at your location
  • /portal [x] [y] [z] - Get coords for a portal at a block position
  • /portal [x] [y] [z] - Get coords for a portal at a block position in a specific dimension
  • /portal help - displays an in-game help message
Default keybind for Nether Coords is F8!

Nether Coords is a Fabric Only mod that requires the Fabric Loader and the Fabric API

This mod is coded entirely on my free time so if you like it and want to help me out, consider supporting me!
